case_title: IMETROS.COM, INC. VS. STRATICS NETWORKS, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2021 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPT. 506.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ABRAHAM VALENTINO, EMPLOYEE, ORFFICER OR DIRECTOR OF THE CORPORATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMETROS.COM, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANDREW ILER, (POSITION/TITLE NOT STATED) FILED BY DEFENDANT STRATICS NETWORKS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IMETROS.COM, INC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW TIME FOR SERVICE. DEFENDANT STRATICS NETWORK INC IS NOT PRESENT.. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
CORRESPONDENCE RECD FROM STRATICS STATING THEY HAVE NO RECORD OF EVER DOING BUSINESS WITH PLANTIFF- PLACED IN FILE. RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT STRATICS NETWORKS, INC.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/15/21 ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO STRATICS NETWORKS-RETURN TO SENDER/NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IMETROS.COM INC., REPRESENTED BY ABRAHAM VELENTINO, (POSITION NOT STATED) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STRATICS NETWORKS, INC., REPRESENTED BY ANDREW ILER IS PRESENT VIA UNATUHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT DISCUSSES ISSUES REGARDING PROOF OF SERVICE . DEFENDANT TESTIFIES TO THE COURT THAT STRATICS NETWORKS, INC., IS A COMPANY IN CANADA AND DOES NOT DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA. A BUSINESS SEARCH ON THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE CONFIRMS THAT THERE IS NOT A BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA REGISTERED UNDER THE NAME OF STRATICS NETWORKS, INC. DEFENDANT ALSO TESTIFIES THAT THE FORM OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF CLAIM RECEIVED IS IMPROPER AND DOES NOT FOLLOW THE PROOF OF SERVICE RULES OF THE HAGUE CONVENTION. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,167.31 FILED BY IMETROS.COM, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STRATICS NETWORKS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
